The Formula

Everything You Need to Know

Formulated by nutritional scientists. Backed by clinical evidence. Made with absolute transparency.

Product Description

A premium 12-in-1 gut health formula with the most bioavailable botanicals and clinically validated probiotic strains.

12 premium botanical extracts
10 billion CFU probiotic blend
Zero fillers · No artificial additives
Vegan · Gluten-free · UK Manufactured

Dosage Information

Each serving delivers clinically effective doses — so you experience real, measurable results.

2 capsules per serving
60 capsules per bottle (30 servings)
Each capsule: 500mg active complex
Clinically dosed per latest research

How to Take

Follow our scientifically designed protocol for optimal absorption. Consistency over 8–12 weeks delivers best results.

Take 2 capsules each morning
With 250ml of water before breakfast
Consistency for 8–12 weeks optimal
Store in cool, dry place
Inside the Formula

Premium Ingredients

Every ingredient chosen for its clinical evidence, bioavailability, and synergistic effect. No fillers. No compromises.

Our Story

About Well Science

Born from a belief that nature and science are not opposing forces — but perfect partners.

Our Mission

Pioneering the Future of Natural Wellness

Well Science was founded in 2019 by a team of nutritional scientists, naturopathic practitioners and wellness entrepreneurs who shared a singular belief: that the most effective supplements are those that honour both the intelligence of nature and the rigour of clinical science.

Every formula we create begins with a deep review of peer-reviewed literature. We identify the most bioavailable forms of each ingredient, work with certified botanical suppliers, and manufacture exclusively in MHRA-registered, GMP-certified UK facilities.

We believe your body deserves supplements that are as clean as they are effective — no fillers, no unnecessary additives, just pure botanical potency backed by science.

🌿
What We Stand For

Our Core Values

The principles that guide every decision we make, from sourcing to formulation.

🔬

Science First

Every ingredient is chosen based on clinical evidence. We only use forms and doses that research supports.

🌿

Botanical Purity

We source the highest-quality botanical extracts from certified sustainable suppliers around the world.

♻️

Sustainability

Plastic-free packaging, carbon-neutral shipping, and supply chains that support regenerative agriculture.

🤝

Radical Transparency

Full ingredient disclosure. No proprietary blends. We believe you deserve to know exactly what you're taking.

The People Behind Well Science

Meet the Team

Scientists, nutritionists and wellness advocates dedicated to changing how the world thinks about supplementation.

👩‍🔬
Dr. Eleanor Hart
Co-Founder & Chief Science Officer

PhD in Nutritional Biochemistry from UCL. 15 years of research in phytotherapy and gut microbiome science.

👨‍⚕️
Dr. Marcus Webb
Head of Formulation

Integrative medicine physician and naturopath with a focus on evidence-based botanical interventions.

👩‍💼
Sophie Adeyemi
Co-Founder & CEO

Former health tech entrepreneur. Passionate about democratising access to premium-quality wellness products.

Every product manufactured to the highest international standards.
